-- 1 of 3 --

In this lesson, I’m going to give you the exact
questions you need to ask your Last Mile Delivery
provider to make sure you don’t get charged extra
fees.
Last Mile Delivery Costing Structure
[Consignment Charge + Weight Charge] x Fuel
Surcharge
LESSON:
LAST MILE DELIVERY (LMD)
MODULE:
MANUFACTURING &
OPERATIONS AT SCALE
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Re-evaluate the carriers your brand uses.
❏ 	Go through the questionnaire in the workbook.
Last Mile Delivery Questions
Ask your LMD provider the following questions prior
to initiating a partnership.
❏ 	What is your costing structure?
❏ 	Do you charge a re-delivery fee?
❏ 	Is ATL an option?
❏ 	Do you charge a storage fee?
❏ 	Do you charge a residential surcharge?
